description: An online order contains two items, but one is in a different warehouse. The order needs to be split into two separate shipments.

nodes.task_description: The order management system identifies that items in the order are sourced from different locations.

expected_outcome.value: The system's logic flags the order for splitting.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically splits the single order into two separate fulfillment orders, one for each warehouse.

expected_outcome.value: Two new fulfillment requests are created from the original sales order.

nodes.task_description: Each warehouse picks and packs their part of the order, and the customer receives two separate shipping notifications with two tracking numbers.

expected_outcome.value: The order is fulfilled efficiently from multiple locations.
